meaning: n.大学一年级新生,新鲜人
examples: The surface formed mostly in the last billion years, which makes it fresher and more recently active than any rocky planet other than earth.
Regular exercise will help you feel fresher and fitter.
The air here is much fresher than before.
"After a holiday and a pre-season, they will be fresher, " he told BBC Sport.
He adds that fish frozen immediately at sea is fresher than so-called fresh fish.
